industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: ELECTR.GENER. -FGN- BA 10
summary: Electricity Generating Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, generates and sells electricity to government sector and industrial users primarily in Thailand, the Philippines, and Australia. The company operates in two segments, Electricity Generation and Other Businesses. It generates electricity from various resources, such as natural gas, liquefied natural gas, coal, biomass, hydro, solar, wind, geothermal, and fuel cell. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated 28 operating power plants with total equity contracted capacity of 5,475 MW in 6 countries in the Asia Pacific region; and 2 projects under construction with total equity contracted capacity of 171 MW. It also provides operation, maintenance, engineering, and construction services to power plants, petrochemical plants, oil refineries, and other industries. Electricity Generating Public Company Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
